scripts.dev:playground: bun run --filter hextimator dev & bun run --filter '@hextimator/playground' dev & bun run --filter playground dev
scripts.dev:website: bun run --filter hextimator dev & bun run --filter '@hextimator/playground' dev & bun run --filter website dev
scripts.build:website: bun run --filter hextimator build && bun run --filter '@hextimator/playground' build && bun run --filter website build
scripts.build:playground: bun run --filter hextimator build && bun run --filter '@hextimator/playground' build && bun run --filter playground build
